content: Arniel Gane: Gods, Tolfdir, these ruins reek of ancient dust and stale Draugr cum. You'd think after centuries down here, they'd learn to wipe their fucking chins. Tolfdir: Ah, Arniel, always so... vivid. Though I suppose after finding that last chamber full of Falmer and their... ... captives, Arniel Gane: At least the Centurion would crush my pelvis Tolfdir: You know, back in my youth, I once stumbled upon a coven of witches near Dawnstar. They had... uses for their staffs. Still gives me a stiffy thinking about it. Arniel Gane: Of course got nostalgic over witches. Meanwhile, I’m knee-deep in Dwemer cogs and warped soul gems, trying to unlock the secrets of Kagrenac’s tools while Mirabelle breathes down my neck like a whore waiting for her septims. Tolfdir: Oh, don’t act like you don’t enjoy her attention. Saw the way you eyed her when she bent over that conjuration table last week. Robes barely covered her arse. Arniel Gane: And didn’t? Please. I may be bald, but I’m not blind. Though I’d take her over Savos any day—that Dunmer bastard’s probably fucking ghosts in the Midden. Tolfdir: By Ysgramor’s beard, Arniel! At least keep it down—some of these Draugr might wake up and take offense. Or worse, get Arniel Gane: Fuck ‘em. If they rise, I’ll shove Keening so far up their rotten assholes they’ll wish they stayed dead. Tolfdir: And they say the reckless one. Arniel Gane: Reckless? No. Just

Tolfdir: Well, I suppose we ought to focus on cataloging these artifacts before morning. distractions Just try not to collapse the ruins in the process. The last thing we need is the College losing both its researchers and its dignity in one night. Arniel Gane: Pfft. accident Tolfdir: Ah, well. Back to work, then.

Lydia: You know what I hate about this damn College? Everywhere I look, some elf or cat bastard is slithering around like they own Skyrim. Magic this, magic that—bah! Real Nords fight with steel and honor, not prissy little spells. Tolfdir: My dear, the arcane arts demand respect and discipline—qualities I imagine you’d find invaluable if you weren’t so busy splitting skulls and… whatever else occupies your evenings. Lydia: Oh, piss off, old man. Least I don’t need a robe to hide my shriveled dick. Bet your magic can’t even stiffen it anymore. Tolfdir: Ah, youth. So obsessed with baser instincts. Though I confess, even at my age, Dibella’s… influence is hard to ignore. Especially in Winterhold. Seen more bare skin here than in a whiterun brothel. Lydia: Damn right. And real Nord women don’t whimper behind spells when a Draugr’s got ‘em pinned. They bite its rotting cock off and shove it down its throat. Tolfdir: Fascinating imagery. Though perhaps less… visceral discussions would suit the Hall of the Elements. Lydia: Hah! Bet you’d melt like a frost troll’s balls if you saw what MJR and I do to bandits after a fight. That Dragonborn knows how to leave corpses smiling. Tolfdir: …I’ll… take your word for it. Though if you’re quite done, I do have actual research to attend to. Lydia: Yeah, yeah. Go fondle your scrolls or whatever. I’ll be outside, keeping MJR safe from those bandit cunts who want to milk him dry. Damn sluts wouldn’t know honor if it skewered their— Oi, MJR! Save the tongues—I’ve got plans for those later.

Lydia: Ugh, fine. Let's see you conjure up something useful, old man. Like a spell to make Serana shut her fangs for once. Tolfdir: Focus, my dear. The Path of Magic rewards those who embrace wisdom—not just brute force and... vigorous extracurriculars. Lydia: Pfft. Tell that to MJR. Guy’s got more magic in his cock than half your apprentices.
